subject: sdc-cs-config-cssandra pod failed to start

Patch Set 1:

It has to go in along with https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/85194/ to make it work in OOM and docker based deployment until SDC using shared cassandra OOM patch goes in.

Patch Set 1:

Mahendra, do we still need this patch? according to https://jira.onap.org/browse/SDC-2235 the Cassandra change is reverted

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Right now the pod completed successfully without this patch. 

dev-sdc-sdc-cs-config-cassandra-4tcfx                         0/1     Completed               0          101m

Mark it -1 so that it's not merged unnecessarily. Please change it if you think we need this patch for some reason.

Abandoned

Abandoning this, would be delivered as part of https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/82787/
